title: LifeTrac HIL gate run result
description: One JSON object per Wave-4 bench run, appended to bench-evidence/<gate>/results.jsonl by the harness scripts under DESIGN-CONTROLLER/hil/.

gate_id.description: Wave-4 gate identifier from MASTER_TEST_PROGRAM.md section 4.

run_id.description: Unique run id: <gate>_run-<NNN>_<YYYY-MM-DD>[_<rung>]. The optional rung suffix is used for gates that sweep parameters (e.g. W4-01 across SF7/SF8/SF9).

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp at which the run was logged.

operator.description: Operator handle. Two distinct operators must sign off a gate per HIL_RUNBOOK.md sign-off rules.

firmware_sha.description: Git short-SHA of each firmware image flashed for this run. Use 'unknown' if a node was not involved in this gate.

hw_serial.description: Optional hardware serial numbers / MAC addresses for traceability.

result.description: PASS = run met its per-run pass criterion; FAIL = explicit failure; SKIP = run intentionally skipped (e.g. dependent gate not green); ABORT = §0.4 abort criterion tripped.

metrics.description: Gate-specific numerical observations (e.g. {"latency_ms": 67.4} for W4-01). Free-form per gate; the harness writes whatever it captured.

evidence_paths.description: Workspace-relative paths to scope CSVs, audit-log captures, photos, etc. Resolved against the repo root.

notes.description: One-paragraph operator note: deviations from procedure, environmental conditions, anything weird.
